---
name: Suggestion
about: Idea suggestion
title: "[Suggestion]"
labels: 'Suggestions'
---

#### Is your suggestion related to a certain topic?
- A clear and concise description of the topic. -> *__Ex.__ The topic is [...] / I think this is related to [...]*
- Just write "**No precise topic**" if you don't know or if your suggestion isn't related to a precise topic.

#### Describe the suggestion you have in mind
- A clear and concise description of what you would like to see. *(Don't ask you if it is possible but if you want to have it)*

#### Additional content
- Add any other content about the suggestion here. *(It can be a schematic you made, a part of code, a drawing, [...])*
